zh.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩
zh.lifeSummary: Jonas Bowen於1608年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Martha Henchman至少有2個兒子。他去世於1699年4月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩享年91歲。

zh-hans.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jonas Bowen于1608年出生在英国英格兰。他和Martha Henchman至少有2个儿子。他去世于1699年4月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bowen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Owain ‘son of Owain’ (see Owen ), with fused patronymic marker (a)p, which is normally voiced before a vowel.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’, a diminutive of Buadhach ‘victorious’ (see Bohan ).
Irish: used to ‘translate’ Ó Cnáimhín ‘descendant of Cnáimhín’, a personal name meaning ‘little bone’ or ‘little body’, see Nevin 1.

variants.name: Bowan
meanings: Irish: variant of Bowen 2, from Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’.

variants.name: Bowens
meanings: Welsh, Irish (Mayo), and English: variant of Bowen , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Owen
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

nameMeanings.name: Jonas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Jonah , from the New Testament Greek form of the name. Both Jonah and Jonas were used by the Puritans, the latter from the 1560s at least.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries - 1660: Baltimore, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America, 1776: Baltimore, Maryland, United States

en.lifeSummary: Jonas Bowen was born in 1608, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 2 sons with Martha Henchman. He died on 13 April 1699, in Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial America, at the age of 91.

ja.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: イギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州ボーティモーボーティモー
ja.lifeSummary: Jonas Bowenは1608年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼はMartha Henchmanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1699年4月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州ボーティモーボーティモーで91歳で死去した。

ko.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어 바팀어
ko.lifeSummary: Jonas Bowen(은)는 1608년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 Martha Henchman(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1699년 4월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어 바팀어에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.
